texto: but wouldn't it be easier to let go?" she whispered brokenly, desperately."would it be easy to carve out a piece of my heart?" he shook his head. "no, you are a part of me now, and whether or not you are in this world, know that i will forever carry a piece of you with me.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ashley Townsend que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “but wouldn't it be easier to let go?" she whispered brokenly, desperately."would it be easy to ca…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, love, time-travel, com foco em viagem e time-travel.
